name: Odas Elektrik Uretim Sanayi Ticaret A.S.
summary: Odas Elektrik √É¬úretim Sanayi Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells electricity by natural gas combined cycling in Turkey and internationally. It also establishes, commissions, hires, operates, and leases electricity production plants. The company operates a natural gas combined cycle power plant with an installed capacity of 140 Megawatt (MW); a solar energy power plant with an installed capacity of 0.25 MW; and a hydroelectric power plant with an installed capacity of 8.2 MW. In addition, it produces, imports, and wholesales natural gas, liquefied natural gas (LNG), and compressed natural gas (CNG) to exporters, LNG and CNG clients, wholesale companies, consumers, and other customers. Further, the company extracts, purchases, manufactures, imports, exports, sells, and installs various natural stone and mineral ores that primarily include gold, antimony, and coal. Odas Elektrik √É¬úretim Sanayi Ticaret A.S. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
